topic.title: INFO7375 37286 ST: Branding and AI SEC 05 Spring 2026 [VTL-1-OL] Regular Class Zoom Invite
topic.text:
Topic: INFO7375 37286 ST: Branding and AI SEC 05 Spring 2026 [VTL-1-OL]
Time: Jan 10, 2026 12:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)
        Every week on Sat, until May 16, 2026, 19 occurrence(s)
Please download and import the following iCalendar (.ics) files to your calendar system.
Weekly: https://northeastern.zoom.us/meeting/tJcvdeCppjotH9cixJ_ViNi94zNCY-v7T_cI/ics?icsToken=DDChABGdtadccCtdzgAALAAAAPfQ3VRWb5vdEj0ggGgHcw_cTsQD1XVr38jYZMI9YU8ebY6WwK_ojshJ5oGwM4UBX0YOkeS22wgBenX-SDAwMDAwMQ
Join Zoom Meeting
https://northeastern.zoom.us/j/93229181753?pwd=hXje31T45VKiBrVl4Fc5O7TT57JIwk.1

Meeting ID: 932 2918 1753
Passcode: 809591

---

One tap mobile
+13052241968,,93229181753# US
+13092053325,,93229181753# US
